testcase.name: test_daily_report_loads

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing total_revenue assert 'total_revenue' in {'advance_expenses': [], 'ar_credits_today': [{'customer_name': 'Credit Customer 264ebc6f', 'grand_total': 50.0, 'invoice_number': 'SVC-20260302-0011', 'items': [{'description': '2 hours of tilling', 'discount_amount': 0, 'discount_type': 'amount', 'discount_value': 0, ...}], ...}], 'cashier_wallet_balance': 12325.0, 'credit_collections': [], ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bug_fixes_iteration_85.py:386: in test_daily_report_loads assert "total_revenue" in data, "Missing total_revenue" E AssertionError: Missing total_revenue E assert 'total_revenue' in {'advance_expenses': [], 'ar_credits_today': [{'customer_name': 'Credit Customer 264ebc6f', 'grand_total': 50.0, 'invoice_number': 'SVC-20260302-0011', 'items': [{'description': '2 hours of tilling', 'discount_amount': 0, 'discount_type': 'amount', 'discount_value': 0, ...}], ...}], 'cashier_wallet_balance': 12325.0, 'credit_collections': [], ...}
